roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOT VACATE SN & ADMSSN FRM 052714 & MOT DISM FILED

/CAL:MOTION TO VACATE SN & WITHDRAW ADMISSION FROM 5-27-14, & MOTION TO DISMISS PETITION/DAWT/MO GRTD/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 3-28-14, GOOD CAUSE FOUND WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS, /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:130 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR61  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT ATTHE MCALISTER INSTITUTE,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE STAFF AND AFFILIATES OF ADULT PAROLE,  A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, MAY 29, 2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY CHRIS PEDRAZA OF CENTERPOINT WHO ASSISTED INTHE CLIENT'S PLACEMENT,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETIONTO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 90 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  VIOLATION #2 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSED,COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 3-28-2014 WITH NO TIME LOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:05-15-14/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TO SET/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/X:COURT ORDERS A 4011,6 WITH THE SPECIFIC REQUEST THAT JAIL PSYCH (BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES) EVALUATE DESMOND STITES FOR BOTH PSYCHIATRIC ISSUESAND COGNITIVE FUNCTIONING LEVEL IN LIGHT OF HIS COGNITIVE DISORDER WHICH ISDUE TO TRAUMATIC BRAIN INJURY,/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP: 05-01-14/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TO SET/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD:TO SETOR DISPO/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD:STATUSOF PLACEMENT,/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/CONTD:TO SETOR DISPO/
